name: Hand-Embroidered Iraghi Cap
description: A vibrant, traditional Hunza cap featuring intricate Iraghi cross-stitch embroidery. Hand-crafted using brightly colored threads in geometric floral patterns that celebrate the cultural heritage of Gilgit-Baltistan.

name: Pure Yak Wool Pattu Shawl
description: An incredibly warm and durable shawl woven from un-dyed, pure Himalayan yak wool on a traditional loom. Perfect for extreme winters, carrying the earthy, natural tones of the Karakoram ranges.

name: Hamade Rubbab
description: A magnificent jewelry or keepsake box hand-carved from solid Hunza walnut wood. Featuring deep relief floral motifs inspired by local flora, finished with natural oils to protect the rich, dark grain.

name: Lapis Lazuli Silver Ring
description: A striking statement ring set with a deep celestial-blue Lapis Lazuli stone, sourced from the regional mountains. Encased in handcrafted 92.5% sterling silver with subtle tribal filigree work.

name: Organic Sun-Dried Apricots
description: Premium, golden apricots harvested from the high-altitude orchards of Hunza Valley. Sun-dried naturally on rooftops without any chemical preservatives, offering a burst of sweet, natural energy.

name: Hand-Woven Sharma Rug
description: A traditional Gilgit 'Sharma' rug made from goat and sheep wool. Woven by hand using centuries-old techniques, featuring bold red, black, and natural white tribal patterns that bring warmth to any space.

name: Hand-Painted Ceramic Bowl
description: A beautiful glazed ceramic bowl hand-painted with intricate local motifs. Perfect for serving or as a decorative piece, reflecting the rich artistic traditions of the region.

name: Traditional Rabab
description: A masterfully crafted Rabab, the traditional stringed instrument of the mountains. Carved from aged mulberry wood with authentic goat skin and nylon strings for a rich, resonant sound.

name: Authentic Hunza Shilajit
description: Pure, sun-dried Shilajit sourced directly from the high-altitude rocks of the Karakoram. A natural resin packed with fulvic acid and trace minerals for energy and vitality.
